name: Asparagi Di Campo (Cold Marinated Asparagus)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the onion and salt in a bowl large enough to hold the asparagus.
2. Mix well and let steep for 30 minutes.
3. Add the capers, lemon juice, and mint leaf. Marinate for at least 1 hour, mixing thoroughly from time to time.
4. Meanwhile, bring an asparagus cooker to a boil and cook the asparagus until tender but still crisp, about 3 minutes. Drain.
5. Toss the still warm asparagus with the marinade and add salt and pepper. Toss gently and serve.
